title: eriogonum sphaerocephalum
intro: Eriogonum sphaerocephalum, also known as globular buckwheat, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a type of flowering plant in the buckwheat family, characterized by its clusters of small white flowers and rounded seed heads. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriogonum sphaerocephalum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical salve.
